evals.prompt: 我想在 Vue 應用中建立一個顯示所有貼文的列表頁面，支援分頁和篩選，後端用 REST API
evals.expected_output: Trigger on generic CRUD intent, identify a standard list page, choose the list topic, recommend the correct controllers path, and include a REST-specific pagination/filter safety check without asking for extra context.
expectations: Must trigger without mentioning ginjou
Must classify as a standard list page
Must route to controllers.md and backend-rest-api.md
Must mention the REST query contract for pagination and filters
Must not confuse the case with search/select or row actions

evals.prompt: 建立 Nuxt 訂單管理頁面，允許透過 modal 編輯和刪除訂單，row delete 走 confirmation modal，後端用 Supabase
evals.expected_output: Trigger on generic CRUD intent, treat the list as a page flow and the edit/delete actions as non-page modal flows, choose the correct page and data-composable references, and include Supabase mutation safety checks.
expectations: Must trigger without mentioning ginjou
Must state Nuxt root guidance if needed
Must split page list behavior from modal edit/delete behavior
Must route to controllers.md, data-composables.md, and backend-supabase.md
Must mention Supabase id mapping and mutation safety checks

evals.prompt: 我的 Nuxt 應用需要一個使用者搜尋欄位，當使用者輸入時遠端過濾 Supabase API
evals.expected_output: Trigger on remote search intent, classify the flow as option-loading, choose useSelect, preserve the selected value separately from fetched options, and include the Supabase filter contract.
expectations: Must trigger without mentioning ginjou
Must route to controllers.md and backend-supabase.md
Must prefer useSelect over useList
Must mention selected-value persistence outside the latest result set
Must mention the backend query/filter contract

evals.prompt: 我在 Nuxt 想做一個庫存管理頁，單頁包含列表、編輯抽屜、row delete confirmation，後端用 Supabase
evals.expected_output: Trigger on generic CRUD intent, recognize a mixed single-page flow, split list, drawer edit, and row delete concerns, and produce a Supabase-safe answer with the right page and non-page references.
expectations: Must trigger without mentioning ginjou
Must classify the prompt as a single-page mixed surface
Must route to setup.md, controllers.md, data-composables.md, and backend-supabase.md
Must include drawer edit and row delete confirmation as separate concerns
Must mention Supabase mutation safety and id mapping checks
